macro.title: Housing demand still growing as mortgage rates reach inflection point
macro.what: Despite higher oil prices and mortgage rates and no indication that Iran war is ending, existing home sales posted another positive week.
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: Escalating Iran War, Rising Oil Prices, Fed Uncertainty Push Mortgage Rates to 6-Month High
macro.what: The daily average mortgage rate rose to a six-month high of 6.53% on March 20
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: 3 in 5 Americans Fear AI Could Replace Jobs, Making it Harder to Afford Homes
macro.what: Just 30% of Americans believe advances in AI will help boost the economy and help more people afford homes, according to a recent Redfin survey
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: Homebuyers Can Afford to Take Their Time Heading Into Spring 2026
macro.what: The typical home that went under contract in February spent 66 days on the market—the slowest February pace in a decade
macro.why: Price trend signals wealth effects and buyer/seller power.
macro.market: Firm prices help builder margins; softness hits comps and sentiment.

housing.title: There Are 630,000 More Home Sellers Than Buyers—the Biggest Gap on Record
housing.what: When sellers outnumber buyers, the buyers who are in the market have bargaining power
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.title: February’s $30M+ Home Sales Cluster in Florida and NYC—Including Two in the Same Barrier Island Enclave
housing.what: Florida and New York dominated February’s ultra-luxury housing market, with oceanfront estates and Central Park condos going for more than $50 million
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

housing.title: APM’s Michael Banner on why HECM for Purchase has failed to take off
housing.what: Reverse mortgage educator Michael Banner says HECM for Purchase is underutilized, held back by stigmas, weak hiring and limited Realtor outreach.

housing.title: Luxury housing’s resilience: Why the top of the market is moving on a different cycle
housing.what: Michael Altneu, VP of global luxury at Coldwell Banker, discusses the forces driving luxury housing demand and why the top tier is diverging from the broader market
housing.why: Rent moves feed shelter inflation and multifamily fundamentals.
housing.market: Rising rents help MF REITs; falling rents ease inflation but pressure NOI.

housing.title: How declined loan analysis can turn more mortgage “no’s” into closings
housing.what: Every mortgage lender knows that declined loans represent marketing spend, staff time and operational resources that never convert into funded loans or revenue

housing.title: Arizona housing reform push would curb HOA, design mandates
housing.what: After failing to turn starter-home legislation into law, Arizona lawmakers are advancing two bills that would curb local control over design standards, homeowners associations and contractor licensing – a renewed attempt to chip away at costs amid the state’s housing shortage
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.what: The average rate for an ARM so far this month is 5.51%, compared with a 6.19% average for a 30-year fixed rate mortgage
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.

notables.title: Why these round homes are resilient to hurricanes
notables.what: Deltec Homes builds round prefabs rated up to roughly 190 mph, and cites a 99.9% major hurricane survival rate over 3 decades.
